prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical daily log returns for MRK over the past year were analyzed to estimate the daily drift (mean log return) and daily volatility (standard deviation of log returns). For MRK, these parameters were estimated to be approximately a daily drift of 0.0003 and a daily volatility of 0.011. These parameters, along with the current price of $120.52 and a time horizon of 22 trading days, were used to forecast the future price distribution. The point estimate represents the median of this distribution, and the confidence intervals are derived from the corresponding percentiles of the log-normal distribution predicted by the GBM model.
